title: Origins: The Owl House
description: An Origin plugin that adds covens and spells themed on The Owl House, made for Origins-Reborn!
body:
# TitanCraft

TitanCraft is a Minecraft plugin for Paper that adds to the Origins-Reborn plugin, making origins themed around the Coven system from The Owl House!

By default the Covens are the same 'layer' to the regular origins, meaning you can only select either an origin or a coven.

If you don't want players to be able to select origins and only want the coven system, you can delete the origins from the folder `~/plugins/Origins-Reborn/origins/`

Alternatively, if you want players to be able to select both a coven AND an origin, you can set the covens to be on a separate 'layer', you can find a guide to that by the original maker of Origins-Reborn [here](https://starshooter.gitbook.io/origins-reborn/custom-origins/layers).

## Disclaimer

Due to a bug in Modrinth this project is listed as being owned by cometcake575, as this project is in the Starshooter organisation, however it is not linked to the Starshooter discord.

For support with this addon, you should join the [TitanCraft Discord server](https://discord.gg/2RgwjHZUz2).

## Covens added by the plugin:
- Abomination Coven
  - You can summon an Abomination, as well as give it weapons to fight with.
- Bard Coven
  - Shrill Whistle will stun anything nearby for 10 seconds.
  - Echolocation will give nearby things the 'glowing' effect, but only from your perspective.
- Beast Keeping Coven
  - Beast Feeder allows you to feed animals without using any food.
  - Beast Sense lets you track where players have been for the last 5 minutes.
- Construction Coven
  - You can use Strength Glyphs to increase your strength and speed for 30 seconds.
  - Breaking blocks with your hands is faster, as if using a Diamond Pickaxe.
- Healing Coven
  - You can create a ring that heals anything inside of it.
  - Using a Magical Defence spell you can make yourself invulnerable to damage for 15 seconds.
- Illusion Coven
  - The Blinding Illusion will create a magical ring that blinds anyone else inside of it.
  - The Invisibility spell turns you invisible until you take damage.
- Oracle Coven
  - Good Fortune gives you a chance to get double loot in chests.
  - Spirit Sense lets you see trails leading you directly to nearby players.
- Plant Coven
  - Green Fingers lets you speed up the growth of plants without bone meal.
  - Tree Feller lets you cut down whole trees by only breaking one block.
- Potions Coven
  - You can place down brewing stands that have infinite uses and your potions start half-brewed.
  - Your Potion Breath means any potion you drink lasts forever until you drink another.

## The Emperor's Coven

There is also an "Emperor's Coven", which allows you to use all types of magic.

You can switch between types of magic by right clicking with a sword.

To select this coven you need a special permission, `titancraft.emperors_coven`.

No players, even operators, have this permission by default - you can give it to players using plugins like LuckPerms.

# Sigils

All Covens have a sigil which appears on the player's arm.

To enable these you must open another port on your server and set up sigils in the config.yml, as well as install [SkinsRestorer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinrestorer).
